Synopsis
Set against the backdrop of the IC-814 hijacking in 1999 and the 2001 Indian Parliament attack, the film follows Indias Intelligence Bureau Chief Ajay Sanyal, who crafts a daring and indomitable mission to infiltrate and dismantle a powerful terrorist network operating out of Pakistan. To execute this high-risk operation, Sanyal recruits an unlikely asset  a 20-year-old boy from Punjab, held captive for committing a revenge-driven crime. Recognising the boys potential and raw intensity, Sanyal decides to mould him into a weapon capable of penetrating Karachis ruthless underworld mafia.

Dhurandhar Final Worldwide Box Office Collection: Ranveer Singh Film Ends Theatrical Run With 10 Major Records
Authored by
:
Mudit Bhatnagar
Updated Feb 19, 2026, 16:59 IST
Dhurandhar has ended its theatrical run as a historic blockbuster. The Ranveer Singh and Aditya Dhar film dominated both India and overseas markets, broke several major records, and became one of the biggest Hindi films ever. Its massive popularity continued even after its OTT release.
Follow
Dhurandhar has ended its theatrical run with
record-breaking numbers
, putting Ranveer Singh and director Aditya Dhar at the top of the box office charts. The spy action thriller, also starring Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, and Sara Arjun has delivered one of the biggest successes in recent years. Released only in Hindi, the film managed to dominate the domestic market and perform strongly overseas. After a long run of over 75 days in cinemas, the film has officially wrapped up its journey as one of the highest-grossing Bollywood films ever made!
Dhurandhar Box Office Records
Dhurandhar Set Indian And Global Box Office On Fire
In India, Dhurandhar collected a staggering Rs 894.49 crore net by the end of its theatrical run, according to Koimoi. The film enjoyed a strong and steady performance for more than two months. Even after its release on Netflix, audiences continued to watch it in cinemas. It recorded 3.6 crore footfalls, making it the most-watched Bollywood film in the post-pandemic period.
Breaking It Down
Powered via AI
How did Dhurandhar perform in its second week?
What records did Dhurandhar break compared to other films?
How did Dhurandhar perform internationally?
Ranveer Singh In Dhurandhar
Made on a reported budget of Rs 225 crore, the film earned profits of over Rs 660 crore. It entered the Rs 800 crore club and became the highest-grossing Hindi film of all time, beating Pushpa 2: The Rule in the Hindi market.
Globally, Dhurandhar collected Rs 1354.84 crore gross. Out of this, Rs 299.35 crore came from overseas markets. The film is now the second highest-grossing Bollywood film worldwide, only behind Dangal starring Aamir Khan.
During its glorious theatrical run, Dhurandhar broke and created many box office records. The unprecedented success and popularity of the film has cemented its status as the all-time mega blockbuster.
Dhurandhar Final Worldwide Box Office Collection
India net: Rs 894.49 crore
India gross: Rs 1002.39 crore
Overseas gross: Rs 299.35 crore
Total worldwide gross: Rs 1354.84 crore
10 Major Records Held By Dhurandhar
Highest-grossing Bollywood film ever
Highest-grossing film in Hindi cinema
First Hindi film to enter Rs 800 crore club
Highest-grossing Hindi film in its 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th, and 7th week
Highest-grossing adult film in India
Fastest Hindi film to cross Rs 500 crore
Fastest Hindi film to cross 1000 Rs crore worldwide
Only Bollywood film to earn Rs 10 crore plus for 28 consecutive days
Biggest second weekend grosser in Hindi cinema
Biggest second week grosser in Hindi cinema
About
Dhurandhar 2
The show is not over yet as Ranveer  Singh's Hamza will return on March 19 to take revenge from Pakistan. Titled
Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge
, the sequel will be clashing with Yash's Toxic at the box office.

Dhurandhar Movie Related Questions
What is the Dhurandhar movie release date?
A: The Dhurandhar movie release date is 05 December 2025.
What is the budget of Dhurandhar?
A: Dhurandhar Movie budget is estimated to be 150 crore.
What is the total box office collection of Dhurandhar?
A: Our tracking shows that Dhurandhar has collected 952.69crore gross in India, with a worldwide gross of 
1237.69
crore.
Is Dhurandhar a hit or a flop?
A: Dhurandhar is an All-Time Blockbuster.
What does Dhurandhar
Net Collection
mean?
Net collection
refers to the total amount Dhurandhar earns at the box office after deducting GST (taxes) from the gross ticket sales within India.
(This is the number most commonly used to track a films performance day-by-day.)
What does the Dhurandhar
Gross Collection
mean?
Dhurandhar
Gross collection
is the total money earned from ticket sales before any deductions, including GST and exhibitor cuts.
(It represents the full revenue generated from theaters in India.)
What does the * mark mean in the Dhurandhar Collection report?
The
asterisk (*)
next to a days number indicates that the
figure is not final
. It means the number is
estimated, provisional, or based on limited sample data
and may be updated later.
What does rough data mean in the Dhurandhar Collection report?

Rough data
 means the number is
approximate
and not yet verified.
It comes from
trade estimates, partial samples, or unverified reports
and should be treated as a temporary placeholder.
Where can I watch the Dhurandhar Full movie?
A: You can watch the Dhurandhar Full movie in theaters and after some time on OTT Platforms like Netflix and Amazon Prime.
How does BoxOfficeWala calculate Dhurandhars box office collections?
A: We track Dhurandhar box office numbers using trade sources, distributor reports, occupancy data, and movie booking platforms. Read more on our
Methodology Page
.

About BoxOfficeWala
BoxOfficeWalaa platform dedicated to providing authentic, up-to-date, and in-depth analysis of Indian box office collections. At BoxOfficeWala, we go beyond just reporting box office figures. We break down the trends, analyze audience behaviour, and predict the future of films based on accurate data.
Disclaimer
: Box office figures on BoxOfficeWala are based on current data, movie trends, and occupancy rates, which are collected from our research and multiple trade sources, distributors, News media, and Movie Booking Sites. Stay updated with the latest Dhurandhar Box Office Collection Worldwide and track the films complete theatrical performance in one place. Here you will find detailed information about Dhurandhar box office collection day wise, total India net collection, India gross earnings, overseas business, and the overall Dhurandhar worldwide box office collection.
We also cover the films reported production budget and analyze its recovery status to determine the final Dhurandhar box office verdict  Hit or Flop. If you are searching for updates on Dhurandhar budget, worldwide total, and verdict, this page provides a clear and comprehensive breakdown.
Dhurandhar is a Hindi action thriller film directed by Aditya Dhar and produced by Aditya Dhar, Lokesh Dhar, and Jyoti Deshpande under the banner of Jio Studios and B62 Studios.
Dhurandhar stars Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, and Sara Arjun in lead roles.

Dhurandhar Cast and Crew
Here is the complete breakdown of the Dhurandhar cast and crew:
The Star Cast
The film is led by Ranveer Singh in a gritty, high-stakes role, supported by a legendary lineup of actors.
| Actor | Character Name | Role Description |
| Ranveer Singh | Hamza Ali Mazari / Jaskirat Singh Rangi | An Indian spy who infiltrates the Karachi underworld. |
| Akshaye Khanna | Rehman Dakait | A feared gang leader in Lyari (Lead Antagonist). |
| Sanjay Dutt | SP Chaudhary Aslam | A rugged officer of the Lyari Task Force, Sindh Police. |
| R. Madhavan | Ajay Sanyal | The Director of IB (inspired by the persona of Ajit Doval). |
| Arjun Rampal | Major Iqbal | A high-ranking ISI officer and primary strategist. |
| Sara Arjun | Yalina Jamali | The female lead and Hamzas wife in the film. |
| Rakesh Bedi | Jameel Jamali | A senior Pakistani politician and member of the National Assembly. |
| Danish Pandor | Uzair Baloch | Rehman Dakaits cousin and second-in-command. |
| Saumya Tandon | Ulfat | Rehman Dakaits wife. |
| Gaurav Gera | Mohammad Aalam | A juice shop owner and Hamzas secret handler. |
The Creative & Technical Crew
The films technical excellence, from its 214-minute runtime to its realistic action, is credited to this expert team:
- Director & Writer: Aditya Dhar
- Producers: Aditya Dhar, Lokesh Dhar, and Jyoti Deshpande
- Music & Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev (Lyrics by Gulzar & Kumaar)
- Cinematography: Vikash Nowlakha
- Film Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
- Action Directors: Yannick Ben, Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, and Ramazan Bulut
- Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra
- Production Designer: Saini S. Johray

Dhurandhar Story:
Dhurandhar is a gritty espionage thriller that reimagines Indias covert response to major terror attacks like the 1999 Kandahar hijack and the 2001 Parliament attack.
The story follows Jaskirat Singh Rangi (Ranveer Singh), a former army officer on death row for a revenge-driven crime. He is secretly recruited by IB Chief Ajay Sanyal (R. Madhavan) for a high-stakes, long-term mission titled Operation Dhurandhar. Jaskirat is given a new identity as Hamza Ali Mazari and sent to the lawless town of Lyari in Karachi, Pakistan.
Undercover as a local Baloch fighter, Hamza spends years infiltrating the inner circle of the ruthless gangster Rehman Dakait (Akshaye Khanna). His mission is to dismantle the nexus between the underworld, corrupt politicians like Jameel Jamali (Rakesh Bedi), and the ISIs Major Iqbal (Arjun Rampal).
The Twist: As Hamza rises through the ranks, he becomes a king-maker in Lyari. The film ends on a high-octane note with the death of Rehman Dakait, leaving Hamza as the new, most powerful figure in the Karachi underworldpositioned perfectly for the final takedown in the sequel, Dhurandhar: The Revenge.
